ga4.notes: GA4 measurement ID G-9QXKKHXPK5, property ID 538957338, and web stream ID 14945244690 are recorded. The measurement ID is configured in Cloudflare Pages as GA_MEASUREMENT_ID, and the site activates GA4 through the runtime config endpoint. Local reporting is verified through the lumenary-analytics quota project.

gsc.notes: Use the Search Console domain property if possible. URL-prefix verification can use the meta tag emitted from PUBLIC_GOOGLE_SITE_VERIFICATION.
